attributes.Sql Query:

MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_HDRS.PREPAY_APPLY_AMOUNT, MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_HDRS.PREPAY_APPLY_FLAG, MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_HDRS.PREPAY_DIST_NUM, MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_HDRS.PREPAY_GL_DATE, MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_HDRS.PREPAY_NUM, MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_HDRS.PURGEABLE_FLAG, MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_HDRS.RECEIPTS_RECEIVED_DATE, MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_HDRS.RECEIPTS_STATUS, MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_HDRS.REFERENCE_1, MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_HDRS.REFERENCE_2, MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_HDRS.REJECT_CODE, MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_HDRS.REPORT_FILING_NUMBER, MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_HDRS.REPORT_HEADER_ID, MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_HDRS.REPORT_SUBMITTED_DATE, 
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_HDRS.RETURN_INSTRUCTION,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32)) RETURN_INSTRUCTION,
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_HDRS.RETURN_REASON_CODE, MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_HDRS.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID, MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_HDRS.SHORTPAY_PARENT_ID, MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_HDRS.SOURCE, MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_HDRS.TOTAL, MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_HDRS.USSGL_TRANSACTION_CODE, MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_HDRS.USSGL_TRX_CODE_CONTEXT, MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_HDRS.VENDOR_ID, MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_HDRS.VENDOR_SITE_ID, MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_HDRS.VOUCHER_NUM, MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_HDRS.VOUCHNO, MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_HDRS.WEEK_END_DATE, MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_HDRS.WORKFLOW_APPROVED_FLAG 
FROM
 MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_HDRS
WHERE  
SOURCE  IN ('NonValidatedWebExpense','WebExpense','SelfService','CREDIT CARD','Both Pay')
AND
(GLOBAL_NAME='BE' or  (GLOBAL_NAME='US' and ORG_ID =161) )AND
GES_UPDATE_DATE>TO_DATE('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
and report_header_id NOT IN (380557310,390332603,390681717,391750072)
